_comment: Non-secret app defaults. Items marked _BLOCKER are team-supplied (04-build-brief §8 / 05-operational-checklist). Stubs here so code runs; do not treat stub values as decisions.

carouselSlideCount._BLOCKER: TEAM: a default like 4-6, OR null = agent always asks the user

autoIdeaCadence._BLOCKER: TEAM: e.g. cron 'Tue,Fri 09:00 IST'; and whether to tie ideas to placement-season/exam timing

linkedin._BLOCKER: TEAM: posting target — 'company_page' (+ org URN) or 'personal'; and who authorizes OAuth

approval._comment: v1: every post requires explicit human approval in Slack; nothing auto-publishes.
